title: MIN 664 (M) Amendment 3: Safety climate tool for the maritime industry
body: "This notice should be read with MIN 635 (M) wellbeing at sea publications, MIN 680 (M) wellbeing at sea and replaces MIN 664 (M) Amendment 2.  This MIN expires 9th April 2026.  Notice to   shipowners ship operators managers masters, officers and crew of merchant vessels   skippers and crew of domestic passenger ships and inland waterway vessels "
